problem id: 97b03b75
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND SHR(4)) XOR SHL(4)

examples:
  01111111 -> 11110111
  00011101 -> 11010000
  01001001 -> 10010100
  10000110 -> 01100000
  10011100 -> 11001000
  01111001 -> 10010100
  11101110 -> 11100110

query: 11101100
predicted answer: 11000110
